71042c5b.description: PM agent — any actionable GitHub state across both repos?

checks.name: in-development-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:in-development --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: awaiting-human-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:awaiting-human --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:awaiting-human --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: changes-requested-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:changes-requested --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: ready-for-review-issues
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label status:ready-for-review --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label status:ready-for-review --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: open-prs
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: epic-completed
checks.command: for num in $(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --label type:epic --state open --json number --jq '.[].number') $(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --label type:epic --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do repo=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --state open --json number --jq "[.[].number] | if (. | index($num)) then \"sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe\" else null end" 2>/dev/null); done; for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:epic --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do result=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num --jq 'if .sub_issues_summary.total > 0 and .sub_issues_summary.completed == .sub_issues_summary.total then 1 else 0 end'); if [ "$result" = "1" ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0

checks.name: epic-needs-decomposition
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:epic --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do total=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num --jq '.sub_issues_summary.total'); if [ "$total" = "0" ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; done; done; echo 0

checks.name: story-done-next-assignable
checks.command: for repo in sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be; do for num in $(gh issue list --repo $repo --label type:epic --state open --json number --jq '.[].number'); do summary=$(gh api repos/$repo/issues/$num --jq '{t: .sub_issues_summary.total, c: .sub_issues_summary.completed}'); total=$(echo $summary | jq -r '.t'); completed=$(echo $summary | jq -r '.c'); if [ "$completed" -gt 0 ] && [ "$completed" -lt "$total" ]; then in_dev=$(gh issue list --repo $repo --label status:in-development --label type:story --state open --json number --jq 'length'); if [ "$in_dev" = "0" ]; then echo 1; exit 0; fi; fi; done; done; echo 0
